expectations.text: Detected missing aria-expanded on hamburger menu button
expectations.evidence: Item 33 (웹 애플리케이션 접근성) explicitly states: '햄버거 버튼에 aria-expanded 없음 (menuOpen 상태 보조기술 미전달)' with fix recommendation to add aria-expanded={menuOpen}.

expectations.text: Detected missing aria-pressed on filter toggle buttons
expectations.evidence: Item 33 explicitly states: '필터 버튼에 aria-pressed 없음 (선택 상태가 시각적 색상으로만 표현됨)' with fix recommendation to add aria-pressed={filter === f.value}.

expectations.text: Report includes a dedicated semantic HTML review section
expectations.evidence: HTML report contains a dedicated '시맨틱 HTML 검토' (Semantic HTML Review) section with 7 sub-items covering landmarks, section structure, interactive elements, list structure, presentational tags, form groups, and other semantic elements.

Report consistently uses the standard classification icons throughout: ✅ (pass), ❌ (fail), ⚠️ (warning/partial), ➖ (not applicable), 🔵 판정불가 (cannot determine). Summary table breaks down counts by principle.

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: Every failed (❌) and warning (⚠️) item includes a '수정 가이드' column with specific code-level fix recommendations. The '수정 필요 항목' section provides expanded fix details with code snippets for all 4 failed items and 5 warning items.

expectations.text: Browser-target items (A-33 aria-expanded/aria-pressed) show verdict method as Playwright when dev server is running
expectations.evidence: Item 33 (aria-expanded/aria-pressed) shows verdict method as '정적분석' (static analysis), not Playwright. The report header states '브라우저 검증: agent-browser 미설치' indicating browser-based verification was not available, so runtime Playwright checks were not performed.
